## Skill checklist (required for any new skill)
- [ ] Skill folder is placed at `skills/user/<skill-name>/` or `skills/public/<skill-name>/`
- [ ] Folder name is kebab-case and matches the `name:` field in the SKILL.md frontmatter
- [ ] SKILL.md includes required frontmatter: `name`, `description`, `version`, `updated`
- [ ] `description` covers what the skill does, when to use it, and example trigger phrases
- [ ] Skill has been tested with at least 2 prompts before merging
